description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the zenato/puppeteer Docker image and runs a before_script that verifies google-chrome-unstable is available. Define a single job named test in the default test stage that sets PUPPETEER_SKIP_CHROMIUM_DOWNLOAD=true, sets CHROMIUM_PATH to the path of google-chrome-unstable, installs npm dependencies, copies .env.example to .env, and executes the test suite with node ace test. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are required.
